name: ai-grouch
description: Plugin bundle for severe but fair code review and planning critique through the Oscar reviewer persona.

interface.shortDescription: Severe but fair reviewer for code, diffs, plans, and architecture
interface.longDescription: Use Oscar for skeptical, evidence-driven review of code, pull requests, refactors, architecture proposals, rollout plans, and full repositories. The bundle packages the ai-grouch skill as a reusable critique workflow focused on real defects, hidden assumptions, and AI slop rather than style theater.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Oscar to review this code, diff, plan, or repository with a skeptical, evidence-driven lens and separate blockers from nits.
